title: Introducing monday magic!

posts.author: bridieca (Bridie Castiel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Your new AI-powered workflow builder in early release!

monday magic forum cover placeholder 21067×604 97.4 KB

Say hello to a whole new way of creating tailor-made work solutions on monday – faster, smarter, and easier than ever.

All you need is an idea and monday magic will turn it into a complete, fully functional solution in moments, using everything we already know about work and a little AI magic.

CLICK HERE TO TRY IT
